message: Operation 'uploadUserPhoto' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. data.current_description: Upload a profile photo for the user
data.description_suggestion: Uploads and stores a profile photo for the authenticated user. Accepts image file data in the request body. Returns the uploaded image URL or file reference that can be used in user profile. The uploaded photo replaces any previously stored profile photo and becomes immediately visible in the user's profile.
